description: Style NoteThese flip flops from gliders reference classic checks on their footbed for colour pop appeal. The footbed adds an interesting dimension to the classic flip-flop without going over the top. Product DetailsBlunt toed flip flop in black with rubber thong style straps Print on the footbedSoft rubber footbedSingle piece rubber outsole that has deep flex groovesMaterial and CareRubberDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
